base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of stage_select_grid — a ui (menu_screen) from 1987 mega man. Stage-Select screen — 2×3 grid of 6 Robot Master portraits with cursor-select and stage-name banner. MM1's signature menu. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Stage-Select screen — 2×3 grid of 6 Robot Master portraits with cursor-select and stage-name banner. MM1's signature menu
